_comment: becky-tools external dependency manifest — the single source of truth for every model/library/binary becky pins, where to watch upstream, and which tool uses it. becky-freshness reads this and reports what is newer upstream so improvements (like a new OCR release) are NEVER missed again. Keep PINNED current when a dep is upgraded; add a row when a tool takes a new dependency.

dependencies.name: Parakeet-TDT-0.6B-v3 (sherpa-onnx)
dependencies.note: ASR runtime; model is the NeMo Parakeet ONNX export. Watch sherpa-onnx releases + the NeMo Parakeet model line.

dependencies.name: InsightFace buffalo_l face pack
dependencies.note: Face detection + ArcFace embeddings via onnxruntime.

dependencies.name: pyannote-segmentation-3.0 (diarization)
dependencies.note: Speaker segmentation ONNX for sherpa diarization.

dependencies.name: Gemma-4 E4B-it audio-visual
dependencies.note: Multimodal (vision+audio) via llama.cpp. BF16 mmproj is mandatory.

dependencies.name: PaddleOCR PP-OCRv6 (classic det+rec)
dependencies.note: becky-ocr now requests PP-OCRv6 newest-first (the model Jordan flagged in iPhone Chrome, released ~2026-06-09), degrading to v5/v4. Activating v6 needs a rapidocr build that knows PPOCRV6 + the v6 ONNX weights (offline-cached on first fetch).

dependencies.name: rapidocr (ONNX port of PP-OCR)
dependencies.note: The Python package becky-ocr runs PP-OCR through.

dependencies.name: PaddleOCR-VL (0.9B document VLM)
dependencies.pinned: WIRED as --engine ppocr-vl (activate by installing the model)
dependencies.note: Document-parsing VLM (layout/table/formula), Apache-2.0, beats GPT-4o-class on doc parsing. Selective escalation for dense document frames. THIS is the improvement that was missed before becky-freshness existed.

dependencies.name: llama.cpp (inference runtime)
dependencies.note: Local C++ inference for multimodal + embeddings + ask.

dependencies.name: Tesseract OCR (fallback/cross-check)
dependencies.note: Zero-GPU CPU fallback for clean document scans; not the primary.

dependencies.name: Liquid LFM2.5-VL (vision; STANDARD = 1.6B)
dependencies.pinned: STANDARD: LFM2.5-VL-1.6B-Q8_0 GGUF (measured richer+consistent vs 450M); 450M = fast-triage only; doc-extract = 1.6B-Extract-GGUF
dependencies.note: Both downloaded + measured head-to-head on becky frames 2026-06-15: 1.6B is the standard vision model (450M flip-flopped a subject's hair colour, disqualifying for forensic ID). Image-only; Gemma-4 stays for AUDIO; exact OCR stays PaddleOCR. USE LFM2.5-VL, NOT old LFM2. LFM Open License (free <$10M). See SPEC-BECKY-VISION-MODELS.md.

dependencies.name: Steinberg VST3 SDK
dependencies.note: VST3 host SDK. RELICENSED to MIT on 2025-10-29 (was dual GPLv3/proprietary) — in-canvas VST hosting is now license-clean. Pin a 3.8.x tag in native/audio-host/scripts/build.ps1. ASIO SDK is separate (dual GPLv3/proprietary, manual at BECKY_ASIO_SDK; WASAPI is the license-clean default).

dependencies.name: NeuTTS Air (Neuphonic) — on-device expressive TTS
dependencies.note: 0.75B qwen2-backbone TTS, GGUF LM via llama-cpp-python + NeuCodec decoder. Installed to X:\AI-2\becky-tools\models\tts (GGUF + venv + samples). Runtime = the neutts-air.exe launcher -> isolated venv -> internal/pyhelpers/tts_neutts.py. Watch the q4/q8 GGUF + the neuphonic/neutts package (github.com/neuphonic/neutts). Alternates: Chatterbox-Turbo (MIT), NeuTTS Nano (license:other).

dependencies.name: NeuCodec (Neuphonic) — neural audio codec decoder
dependencies.note: Decodes NeuTTS Air's tokens to a 24 kHz WAV. Installed to X:\AI-2\becky-tools\models\tts\neucodec; resolved via BECKY_TTS_NEUCODEC. Runs on CPU (set BECKY_TTS_CODEC_DEVICE=cuda for GPU).
